backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing user profiles, access‑controlled rental creation and retrieval, rental search with sorting and pagination, and storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing frontend files, components, and test IDs required for implementing delete‑button and delete‑workflow features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short descriptions of many frontend components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base definitions and OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point defining the root container and loading the main TypeScript bundle.
frontend/ORDER_FLOW_TEST.md: Manual end‑to‑end test instructions for verifying order creation, acceptance, authorization, and status updates.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React router setup with layout, header, footer, and routes for home, search, add rental, owner messages, and orders pages.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Responsive header with logo, navigation links, and mobile menu toggle.
Dialog form for submitting rental purchase requests with validation and order creation.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploader.ts: Image upload component with preview, validation, progress tracking, and removal.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading state and error handling.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusBadge: Displays a colored badge for order status, highlighting Pending and Accepted.
frontend/src/components/RentalCard.tsx: Displays rental details including image, price, category, description, and contact info.
frontend/src/components/SearchRentalResu: Shows rental info with buy dialog and delete option for owners, including confirmation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAcceptOrder.ts: Mutation hook to accept an order and refresh related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Initializes an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuyerOrders.ts: Fetches and formats orders made by the logged-in buyer using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateOrder.ts: Provides a React Query mutation to create an order via the actor and refresh buyer orders on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateRental.ts: Defines a mutation for creating rentals with validation and query invalidation, showing alerts on errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteRental.ts: Implements a mutation to delete a rental and invalidates rental-related queries afterward.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity auth context with login, logout, and identity persistence using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useOwnerOrders.ts: Fetches owner-specific rental orders from the actor and maps raw results into a structured format.
frontend/src/hooks/useRentals.ts: Loads paginated rentals and accumulates pages into a single list with load-more behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchRentals.ts: Queries rentals matching a search term using the actor’s search function with caching and enabled-state checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Fetches a user profile by principal string and exposes the buyer's name with loading state.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddRentalPage.tsx: Renders a form for creating rentals with validation, submission handling, and success feedback.
frontend/src/pages/FindItemsPage.tsx: Placeholder page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the animated homepage with navigation buttons for adding and searching rentals.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrdersPage.tsx: Shows the logged-in user's rental orders with loading, empty state, and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/OwnerMessagesPage.tsx: Displays owner-specific order messages, handles loading states, and allows owners to accept orders via a mutation.
frontend/src/pages/SearchRentalPage.tsx: Provides rental search functionality with dynamic filtering, loading states, and a grid of result cards with local deletion handling.
frontend/src/utils/formatPrice.ts: Formats a bigint rental price into a human-readable monthly price string using the ₹ symbol.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers to read, persist, and clear URL parameters and session-stored values, supporting hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme, colors, fonts, animations, and content paths for the frontend.
project_state.json: Describes current project state, UI/UX goals, architectural constraints, and implemented features for the RentEasy app.
